LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TURK AUTO PARK, INC.'S MOTION OF OPPOSITION TO PHANNA CHEA'S APPLICATION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. IT APPEARS ALL THREE PARTIES ARE AT FAULT TO SOME DEGREE. GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S WAGE LOSS OF $29,400 AND MEDICAL LIEN OF $27,000, THE PROPOSED SETTLEMENT IS REASONABLE FOR IT REFLECTS THE LIMITS OF CHEA'S INSURANCE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600. (302/PJM)
